column1: # 1. test_header_matches_spec: exact required CSV columns in spec order.
# 2. test_rows_are_well_formed: valid CSV row shape with no parser overflow.
# 4. test_provider_and_model_values_are_nonempty_unique_strings: provider/model constraints and no duplicate entries.
# 5. test_price_columns_are_usd_per_million_token_numbers: input/output numeric ranges and selected current prices.
# 6. test_nullable_integer_columns: coding_arena_elo and max_reasoning_tokens are integer-or-blank.
# 8. test_base_urls_are_optional_http_urls: provider base URLs are blank or HTTP(S).
# 11. test_local_ollama_rows_are_free_and_unstructured: local model branch has zero costs and False structured output.
# 12. test_example_script_runs_from_any_working_directory: example has visible output and does not depend on cwd.
# 13. test_catalog_can_be_loaded_as_package_data_resource: CSV is reachable in the package data location.
# 14. Parameter forwarding: not applicable because the deliverable is a static CSV resource and calls no dependencies.

column5: and bad URLs fail the tests above.

column1: matches = [row for row in rows if row["provider"] == provider and row["model"] == model]
assert all(set(row.keys()) == set(EXPECTED_HEADER) for row in rows)
assert all(None not in row.values() for row in rows)
assert all(row["provider"] == row["provider"].strip() and row["provider"] for row in rows)
assert all(row["model"] == row["model"].strip() and row["model"] for row in rows)
assert all(float(row["input"]) >= 0 for row in rows)
assert all(float(row["output"]) >= 0 for row in rows)
assert any(row["coding_arena_elo"] == "" for row in rows)
assert any(row["coding_arena_elo"] for row in rows)
assert any(row["max_reasoning_tokens"] == "" for row in rows)
assert any(row["max_reasoning_tokens"] for row in rows)
assert all(key.endswith("_API_KEY") and key.upper() == key for key in keys)
ollama_rows = [row for row in rows if row["provider"] == "Ollama"]
assert all(float(row["input"]) == 0.0 for row in ollama_rows)
assert all(float(row["output"]) == 0.0 for row in ollama_rows)
assert all(row["structured_output"] == "False" for row in ollama_rows)
assert all(row["base_url"] == "http://localhost:11434/v1" for row in ollama_rows)
